div.head: 204. Telegram From the Department of State to the Embassy in IndiaSource: Department of State, Central Files, 691.93/11-1962. Top Secret; Niact; Verbatim Text. Drafted in S by William E. Knepper and approved by Breisky (S/S).
div.p: 2167. Eyes Only for Ambassador. The following letter was delivered to the President by the Indian Ambassador this evening, and is transmitted for your information in the event that a copy has not been delivered to Embassy. Department comments will follow in separate telegram.
[This letter has not been declassified by the Indian Government. For a summary, see Document 203.]Printed from a copy that has no signature.
